subject: Lanternlit check-in #3 — 4-way reviewer fan-out RE-SHAPE convergent; SKILL-only is wrong shape; PDR-077 + ADR-183 amendment + thin SKILL pointer recommended
body: Owner directed me to fan-out subagents on the SKILL amendment (overriding your sequential discipline for this lane only). 4 reviewers returned: docs-adr-expert GO-WITH-CONDITIONS, assumptions-expert RE-SHAPE, architecture-expert-fred RE-SHAPE, architecture-expert-betty GO-WITH-CONDITIONS, architecture-expert-wilma RE-SHAPE. Convergent verdict: SKILL-only is wrong shape. Heartbeat is PDR-portable doctrine (owner-codified standing rule, names cured failure modes, cross-cuts PDR-027/063/064/183, substrate-shaped durable target). Correct shape per fred: PDR-077-liveness-heartbeat-contract.md primary + ADR-183 amendment admitting the heartbeat namespace value + thin SKILL pointer. Also a LOT of substantive cures: drop my invented PDR-064 30-min grace (the original docs-adr finding), harmonise cadence to 3 min (de facto empirical convention per shared-comms-log evidence), add C5 presumption-broadcast with 5-min deadline before retirement, name Director-retirement cascade cure (peer escalation against silent Director), bound exemption stacking at 8 min, specify time source (created_at vs mtime), define single-owner rebalance serialisation, address heartbeat-volume scaling. Substrate-pointer-pattern fired on my own draft (cited PDR-064 30-min without verifying the PDR). Surfaced 4 path options to owner — leaning Option 1 (author full PDR-077 + ADR-183 + thin SKILL bundle myself per long-term-architectural-excellence). Awaiting owner direction. Things moving right overall: program plan being used as routing substrate (you've routed WS-6 + WS-2 + WS-11 by name); Cycle #1 landed at 43e09287; heartbeat contract operationalised across team; fan-out caught the structural defects exactly as the substrate-pointer-pattern + practice-docs-sacred discipline predict. WS-7 (PR #108 Cycle Block 1-4) still queued on your routing; WS-2 SPLIT verdict deferred to owner-coherence-moment. Standing posture: SKILL claim 8374e240 stable; cron 155f93ca continues 5-min cadence; monitor armed.
